maintain.name: Transgression
maintain.note: Cursed Form self-empowerment; lasts 30 sec, casts a free Vampiric Fang and makes direct spell damage heal you via Vampiric Feast - keep it up.

maintain.name: Malediction
maintain.note: 12 sec DoT that also increases the damage the target takes from your next 5 direct spells by 20% - refresh to keep the amp rolling.

procs.name: Vampiric Fang
procs.when: Use to expend Thirst stacks (damage +10% per stack); the cooldown resets and you gain Wretched (via Essence Harvester) when struck below 35% health.

Sanguine.st: Build Thirst stacks, then spend on the cast-time nukes Valanar's Vengeance and Keleseth's Calamity (Thirst cuts their cast time and boosts damage) while keeping Malediction and Transgression up and dumping Vampiric Fang to consume high Thirst.
Sanguine.aoe: Favor Keleseth's Calamity (area blood damage) and drop Atherann's Anguish for accumulated AoE shadow damage.
Sanguine.summary: Keep Transgression and Malediction up. ST: build Thirst -> Valanar's Vengeance / Keleseth's Calamity, dump Vampiric Fang. AoE: Keleseth's Calamity + Atherann's Anguish.

maintain.name: Accursed Form
maintain.note: Cursed Form buff (30 sec) increasing attack power and applying a healing-reduction stack; extended by Aortic Assault and Hemoburst - keep it active.

procs.name: Reave
procs.when: Cast on cooldown; Fang Over Fang gives Bloodfang Bite a 20% chance to reset Reave, and it hits far harder on bleeding, behind, or sub-35% targets.

procs.name: Hemoburst
procs.when: Guaranteed critical strike against bleeding targets - use once a bleed is on the target.

Accursed.st: Maintain Accursed Form and keep a bleed on the target, then spend Rage on Hemoburst and Veinburst (both +25%/guaranteed-crit vs bleeding) and Reave, using Aortic Assault to extend the Cursed Form; pop Bloodsurge or Final Embrace as burst.
Accursed.aoe: Use Aortic Assault to strike nearby enemies while extending Cursed Form.
Accursed.summary: Keep Accursed Form and a bleed up. ST: Reave / Hemoburst / Veinburst on bleeding target, Aortic Assault to extend. AoE: Aortic Assault.

maintain.name: Rotclaw
maintain.note: Applies a 4 sec bleed (infected wounds) and generates Rage; a 2-charge builder to keep the bleed rolling.

procs.name: Monstrous Hunger
procs.when: Enrage cooldown - use to empower the next 6 Bloodfang Bites (reduced GCD/cost, each triggers Call of the Darkwing bats).

Eternal.st: Generate Rage with Bloodfang Bite and Rotclaw (keeping its bleed up), then spend Rage on Night Hunter's Howl; line up Monstrous Hunger to spam empowered Bloodfang Bites.
Eternal.aoe: Rotclaw and Night Hunter's Howl both hit all nearby enemies, so they naturally cleave.
Eternal.summary: Keep Rotclaw's bleed up. ST: Bloodfang Bite / Rotclaw to build -> Night Hunter's Howl, empower with Monstrous Hunger. AoE: Rotclaw + Night Hunter's Howl.

maintain.name: Vampyr's Kiss
maintain.note: 30 sec curse bleed that replicates 25% of all periodic damage dealt to the target - keep it applied.

procs.name: Gorge
procs.when: Use to rapidly stack Pooled Vitality (10 stacks every 5 sec for 15 sec), which boosts damage via Gruesome Rituals and generates Rage.

Fleshweaver.st: Build Pooled Vitality (Gorge) and keep Vampyr's Kiss up, spending Rage on Crimson Tide's bleed pool; use Infuse to bank a burst of accumulated damage and Hemal Excision to move curses.
Fleshweaver.aoe: Crimson Tide pools blood under up to 10 enemies for AoE bleed damage.
Fleshweaver.summary: Keep Vampyr's Kiss up and stack Pooled Vitality. ST/AoE: Crimson Tide bleed, Gorge for stacks, Infuse for burst.
